title: Paid Advertising
shortSummary: Paid advertising lets you put your message in front of exactly the right people at exactly the right time. This module covers the major platforms, how ad auctions work, targeting, creative best practices, budgeting, and how to measure whether your ads are actually making money.
whyItMatters: Organic reach takes time. Paid advertising gives you immediate visibility and the ability to scale quickly. But it is also the fastest way to burn money if you do not know what you are doing. Understanding how platforms like Google Ads and Meta Ads work, how to target effectively, and how to measure return on ad spend separates profitable campaigns from expensive mistakes.
coreConcepts: How digital ad auctions work: bidding, quality, and relevance
Search ads versus display ads versus social ads versus video ads
Google Ads: search intent and keyword targeting
Meta Ads (Facebook and Instagram): interest and behaviour targeting
TikTok, LinkedIn, and emerging ad platforms
Ad creative best practices: copy, imagery, video
Landing pages and the connection between ads and conversions
Return on Ad Spend (ROAS) and Cost Per Acquisition (CPA)
A/B testing ads and creative iteration
